hero_headlines: Take Control of Your Employee Schedules.
hero_subheads: Designed for restaurant managers in multi-unit groups.
Reduce staffing headaches and streamline workflows.
Manual entry made simple for busy managers.
Never miss a shift change again.
value_props: Basic time tracking for accurate payroll.
Manual-first workflows to fit your needs.
Reduce errors and improve staff communication.
feature_bullets: Easy manual entry of employee shifts.
